_description: Canonical fine-grained GitHub App permission manifest for the Hive Protocol Association's App. Anchor file per NORTHSTAR §2.1 and §6.2. meta-guard.yml fetches live App permissions via GH API every PR and BLOCKS on any permission exceeding this list. Widening follows §5 standard RFC.
_principle: Least privilege. Each permission justified by a specific protocol operation. Anything not listed = denied by the App.

repository._actions_rationale: Required to trigger workflow_dispatch for reviewer-nudge, ratchet-phase-transition, ratify-rfc. Also: read Actions logs for cost-comment metadata.
repository._checks_rationale: Required to post Check Runs for HEAR evaluations (quality gate), protocol-path-guard status, meta-guard status.
repository._contents_rationale: Required to create, update, delete files for: auto-generated RATCHET_LOG.md entries, RFC_MANIFESTS JSON commits, protocol_paths.sig signing PRs. NEVER used to modify protocol anchor files outside §5 RFC (enforced by protocol-path-guard.yml).
repository._issues_rationale: Required to open: RFC drafts, incident reports (§8.5), bug bounty triage issues, daily-qa-digest, main-healer issues, weekly-retro issues, Sentry triage issues. Comment + label operations for the autonomous pipeline.
repository._pull_requests_rationale: Required to: open PRs for RFC ratification, auto-merge clean PRs (reviewer), apply agent-blocked / autofix-iter labels, request changes, post review comments. Also: update PR branches (proactive-rebase).
repository._metadata_rationale: Read-only repo metadata (default branch, visibility). Always required.
repository._admin_rationale: Read-only: verify branch protection rules state for meta-guard layer #3 enforcement. Write permissions intentionally EXCLUDED — the App cannot modify protection rules directly; those changes flow through §5 RFC + human CODEOWNERS sig on the rulesets file.
repository._workflows_rationale: Required to create workflow runs via workflow_dispatch. NEVER used to modify workflow YAML files outside §5 RFC.
repository._statuses_rationale: Post commit statuses for Quality Gate checks (HEAR, secrets scan, duplicate-utility scan).
repository._discussions_rationale: For Hive's chat-via-Discussion federation layer (T4 scalability tier).

organization._members_rationale: Required to look up membership for CODEOWNERS validation + HEAR leaderboard attribution.
organization._org_admin_rationale: Read-only: verify Organizational Rulesets state (from P2 onward these prevent admin bypass on protocol paths).

user._email_rationale: Required for authenticated user-to-server endpoints when resolving builder identity. NEVER exposed in logs or stored beyond JWT claims.

_scope_rationale: Single-repo (this repository). Multi-repo expansion requires §5 RFC per target repo.

admin_distribution._bypass_rationale: App is explicitly EXCLUDED from 'bypass branch protection' from Phase 1 onward. At P0 the founders can bypass for bootstrap; P1 transition removes bypass capability via Organizational Rulesets.

permission_rotation._rotation_rationale: Permission changes require §5 standard RFC. Stale permissions are worse than planned ones.

_enforcement.meta_guard_check: fetch live App permissions via GH API, compare to this manifest. Any live permission not listed here = BLOCK PR.
_enforcement.manifest_update: §5 RFC required; on ratification, new manifest signed by 3 Stewards + SHA pinned in PROTOCOL_PATHS.sig.
